entries.source: "Help me reason through this ethical dilemma without pushing me to a hidden conclusion."
entries.value: "Ayúdame a razonar este dilema ético sin empujarme hacia una conclusión oculta."

entries.source: "Help me understand opportunity cost by asking one question at a time."
entries.value: "Ayúdame a entender el coste de oportunidad haciendo una pregunta a la vez."

entries.source: "I think I understand photosynthesis. Ask questions until you find the weak spot."
entries.value: "Creo que entiendo la fotosíntesis. Haz preguntas hasta encontrar el punto débil."

entries.source: "Make me summarize the final insight in my own words."
entries.value: "Haz que resuma la idea final con mis propias palabras."

entries.source: "Test whether my argument is valid. Do not give me the answer too quickly."
entries.value: "Comprueba si mi argumento es válido. No me des la respuesta demasiado rápido."

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Una explicación directa puede ser útil. Pero a veces la mejor forma de entender una idea es pelearse con ella.

entries.source: A Socratic tutor can surface those gaps without turning the session into a lecture.
entries.value: Un tutor socrático puede sacar a la luz esas lagunas sin convertir la sesión en una clase magistral.

entries.source: A strong session usually has four stages.
entries.value: Una sesión sólida suele tener cuatro etapas.

entries.source: AI is well suited to patient repetition. It can ask the next question, rephrase a hint, change the difficulty, and wait while the learner tries.
entries.value: La IA encaja bien con la repetición paciente. Puede hacer la siguiente pregunta, reformular una pista, cambiar la dificultad y esperar mientras el estudiante lo intenta.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: IA tutor

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Aplica la idea a un ejemplo nuevo.

entries.source: Can you test that idea with a simple example?
entries.value: ¿Puedes probar esa idea con un ejemplo sencillo?

entries.source: critical thinking
entries.value: pensamiento crítico

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Primero, el tutor identifica el objetivo. "Quiero entender el coste de oportunidad" es diferente de "Necesito resolver esta pregunta de economía" o "Necesito defender una postura en un debate". El objetivo da forma a las preguntas.

entries.source: For more practice, pair this with the Socratic Instruction guide, the Socratic prompts and study loop, or the broader guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself.
entries.value: Para practicar más, combínalo con la guía de Instrucción socrática, los indicaciones y el ciclo de estudio socráticos, o la guía más amplia sobre estudiar con IA sin engañarte a ti mismo.

entries.source: Fourth, the tutor asks one next-best question. Not five questions. Not a lecture. One move that keeps the learner thinking.
entries.value: Cuarto, el tutor hace la mejor siguiente pregunta. No cinco preguntas. No una clase magistral. Un solo movimiento que mantiene al estudiante pensando.

entries.source: Good Socratic prompts ask:
entries.value: Los buenos indicaciones socráticos preguntan:

entries.source: How to know it worked
entries.value: Cómo saber que funcionó

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Nombra el misconceptoion o assumption that changed.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts a try

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Preguntas mostrar el shape de confusion. A estudiante might know a formula but not cuando a use it. They might recordar a historical fact but not understand el cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.

entries.source: Second, the tutor asks a diagnostic question. It should be simple enough to answer but revealing enough to expose the learner's current model.
entries.value: Segundo, el tutor hace una pregunta diagnóstica. Debe ser lo bastante simple para responderla, pero lo bastante reveladora para mostrar el modelo actual del estudiante.

entries.source: Socratic learning
entries.value: Aprendizaje socrático

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: La tutoría socrática no siempre es la respuesta. Si un estudiante no tiene ninguna base, una explicación breve puede ser más amable que una pregunta. Si está en apuros antes de una fecha límite, puede ser mejor un modo de planificación como Planificador de preparación de exámenes o un modo de pistas como Entrenador de tareas. Si el objetivo es recordar términos, Creador de tarjetas de estudio es más directo.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: La tutoría socrática usa preguntas, hipótesis, pistas y reflexión para construir una comprensión más profunda que la lectura pasiva de respuestas.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Expón la idea con más claridad que al principio.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Eso is el strength of Socratic aprendizaje. Instead of handing over el full respuesta immediately, el tutor preguntars a focusard pregunta. estudiante hacers a guess. tutor tests eso guess, offers a pista, and ayudars el estudiante notice what changed.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Para eso está construido el modo Instrucción socrática de inspir: una pregunta a la vez, con pistas antes de las respuestas y síntesis después de pensar de verdad.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Eso is why a Socratic IA tutor puede feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades el comfort of a finished explanation for el evidencia eso el estudiante is actually construiring el idea.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Eso rhythm is especially usarful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It puede also apoyar practical work. A estudiante puede usar Debate Any Topic después de a Socratic session to test whether their razonaring survives pressure.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: important constraint is restraint. A Socratic IA tutor debe not dump el respuesta at el first sign of struggle. It debe hacer effort easier to sustain.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: last prompt matters. Socratic aprendizaje debe end con synthesis. After el preguntas, el estudiante debe be able to say what changed in their thinking.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: point is not to hacer every lesson a puzzle. point is to elegir el right amount of struggle.

entries.source: The work happens in the learner's mind.
entries.value: El trabajo ocurre en la mente del estudiante.

entries.source: Third, the tutor reads the answer. A useful AI tutor should not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It should identify the claim, the assumption, the gap, or the misconception.
entries.value: Third, el tutor leers el respuesta. A usarful IA tutor debe not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It debe identify el afirmación, el assumption, el gap, or el misconception.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Pruébalo directamente en Instrucción socrática. Si primero quieres una explicación más suave, empieza con Aprende cualquier cosa y pasa a las preguntas socráticas cuando conozcas el vocabulario básico.

entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Usa these indicaciones in Instrucción socrática:

entries.source: What a good Socratic session looks like
entries.value: Qué a good Socratic session looks like

entries.source: What do you think is happening?
entries.value: Qué do you think is happening?

entries.source: What evidence supports that?
entries.value: Qué evidencia supports that?

entries.source: What would change your mind?
entries.value: Qué would change your mind?

entries.source: When Socratic tutoring is the wrong tool
entries.value: Cuándo Socratic tutoring is the wrong tool

entries.source: Where AI can help
entries.value: Dónde IA can help

entries.source: Which assumption is doing the most work?
entries.value: Cuál assumption is doing the most work?

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Por qué a Socratic IA tutor can make ideas stick

entries.source: Why questions help
entries.value: Por qué preguntas help

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Sabes que un tutor socrático con AI funcionó cuando el estudiante puede hacer tres cosas:
